saved_test.name: Cleft Sentences Basics: V3 All Levels

questions.question: Choose the sentence that correctly expresses basic cleft sentence: {a1}

a1.answer: It was Maria who solved the problem
options: It was Maria who solved the problem
Maria solved the problem
It Maria solved the problem
What solved the problem was Maria
